page: Amazon Web Services p5.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance belonging to the p5 server family, built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. The instance is powered by an x86_64 AMD processor with 16 dedicated vCPUs, corresponding to 8 physical cores with 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.6 GHz.

The hardware specification includes 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per core. For acceleration, the instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU containing 80 GB of VRAM. Local storage is bundled as a 3800 GB NVMe SSD, offering high-speed read and write capabilities directly attached to the instance.

Networking capabilities feature a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, supporting high-throughput data transfers. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the p5.4xlarge offers a dense consolidation of high-performance GPU acceleration, substantial system memory, and fast local storage on a single instance, reducing the overhead associated with multi-node clustering for moderately sized workloads.
This instance is suited for workloads such as deep learning training, large language model inference, high-performance computing, data science pipelines, and GPU-accelerated database operations.
description: Amazon Web Services p5.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance built on the Nitro hypervisor, featuring an x86_64 AMD processor with 16 vCPUs, 8 physical cores, and a 3.6 GHz clock speed. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, a 3800 GB NVMe SSD for high-speed local storage, and a single NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU with 80 GB of dedicated VRAM. Designed for demanding computational tasks, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This resource-dense profile offers high qualitative cost efficiency for single-GPU workloads by combining massive memory capacity with enterprise-grade acceleration. The p5.4xlarge is optimized for workloads such as deep learning model training, large language model inference, high-performance computing, and intensive data science operations.
og_description: Amazon Web Services p5.4xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 16 AMD vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, a 3800 GB NVMe SSD, and one NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU with 80 GB of VRAM for high-performance workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services p5.4xlarge is an x86_64 GPU instance with 16 AMD vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, a 3800 GB NVMe SSD, and one NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU.
tagline: A high-density GPU instance featuring an NVIDIA Hopper H100 accelerator, massive system memory, and fast local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: Powered by 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs running at 3.6 GHz on the Nitro hypervisor
Equipped with one NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU featuring 80 GB of VRAM
Includes 256 GB of system memory and 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps
Suited for deep learning training, LLM inference, and high-performance computing
